instruction: Aplicar principios of codigo limpo e architecture limpa of Robert C. Martin. Use for revisar, refatorar e structure codigo with responsabilidade unica, dependencias corretas e limites architectureis claros. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Codigo Limpo (Clean Code) — Robert C. Martin - Clean Architecture — Robert C. Martin - Desenvolvimento Agil Limpo — Robert C. Martin

workflow.action: Auditar naming, tamanho of functions e separacao of responsabilidades.
Mapear dependencias e verificar conformidade with Dependency Rule.
Isolar logica of negocio of frameworks e banco of data.
Aplicar SOLID by modulo — identificar violactions e refatorar.
Validate testability — business logic must be testable without framework.
